TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_balangbang, title = balangbang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/balangbang} }

S.FORM: == balangbang == ÁßčŚ§© puu' nu balangbang. siwkay nu balangbang balangbang sa, u sakatulu nu puu' nu mihca. zikuz nu lalud. caaytu kacaledes, lingatu tu ku sienaw. masumanah tu ku papah nu kilang. saepi' ku demiad. tinaku a kamu balangbang ÁßčŚ≠£ mabadi' ku papah nu kilang i Lipun tu balangbangan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Autumn or fall is one of the four temperate seasons. Autumn marks the transition from summer to winter, in September or March , when the duration of daylight becomes noticeably shorter and the temperature cools down considerably. One of its main features is the shedding of leaves from deciduous trees.
S.PHON: == bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč == ** puu Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč. siwkaj nu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč sa, u sakatur~…ĺu nu puu Ē~ ° nu mińß ¶a. zikuz nu r~…ĺar~…ĺud. ¶aajtu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, r~…ĺiŇčatu tu ku si…ônaw. masumanańß tu ku papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč. sa…ôpi Ē~ ° ku d…ômiad. tinaku a kamu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč ** mabadi Ē~ ° ku papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč i r~…ĺipun tu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika autumn or far~…ĺr~…ĺ is on…ô of tńß…ô four t…ômp…ôrat…ô s…ôasons. autumn marks tńß…ô transition from summ…ôr to wint…ôr, in s…ôpt…ômb…ôr or mar ¶ńß , wńß…ôn tńß…ô duration of dajr~…ĺigńßt b…ô ¶om…ôs noti ¶…ôabr~…ĺj sńßort…ôr and tńß…ô t…ômp…ôratur…ô ¶oor~…ĺs down ¶onsid…ôrabr~…ĺj. on…ô of its main f…ôatur…ôs is tńß…ô sńß…ôddiŇč of r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs from d…ô ¶iduous tr…ô…ôs.
S.FORM: == balangbang == ÁßčŚ§© puu' nu balangbang. siwkay nu balangbang balangbang sa, u sakatulu nu puu' nu mihca. zikuz nu lalud. caaytu kacaledes, lingatu tu ku sienaw. masumanah tu ku papah nu kilang. saepi' ku demiad. tinaku a kamu balangbang ÁßčŚ≠£ mabadi' ku papah nu kilang i Lipun tu balangbangan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Autumn or fall is one of the four temperate seasons. Autumn marks the transition from summer to winter, in September or March , when the duration of daylight becomes noticeably shorter and the temperature cools down considerably. One of its main features is the shedding of leaves from deciduous trees.
S.PHON: == bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč == ** puu Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč. siwkaj nu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč sa, u sakatur~…ĺu nu puu Ē~ ° nu mińß ¶a. zikuz nu r~…ĺar~…ĺud. ¶aajtu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, r~…ĺiŇčatu tu ku si…ônaw. masumanańß tu ku papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč. sa…ôpi Ē~ ° ku d…ômiad. tinaku a kamu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇč ** mabadi Ē~ ° ku papańß nu kir~…ĺaŇč i r~…ĺipun tu bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika autumn or far~…ĺr~…ĺ is on…ô of tńß…ô four t…ômp…ôrat…ô s…ôasons. autumn marks tńß…ô transition from summ…ôr to wint…ôr, in s…ôpt…ômb…ôr or mar ¶ńß , wńß…ôn tńß…ô duration of dajr~…ĺigńßt b…ô ¶om…ôs noti ¶…ôabr~…ĺj sńßort…ôr and tńß…ô t…ômp…ôratur…ô ¶oor~…ĺs down ¶onsid…ôrabr~…ĺj. on…ô of its main f…ôatur…ôs is tńß…ô sńß…ôddiŇč of r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs from d…ô ¶iduous tr…ô…ôs.
